name: Childcare in Workers Comp Claims Midvale UT

mainEntity.name: Childcare costs covered in workers comp Midvale?
mainEntity.text: Childcare costs covered in workers comp Midvale?

acceptedAnswer.text: No standard benefits exclude dependent care unless total disability proven need.[25]

suggestedAnswer.text: Midvale comp medical wage replacement only; extraordinary expenses like childcare rare via vocational rehab. Prove unemployable without aid for consideration. Sue third-party recovers more.[25]

description: No standard benefits exclude dependent care unless total disability proven need.[25]
